events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! From the Fab Four to his All-Starr Band, his rhythm has kept us grooving for decades.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Rock God Turns 79
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's legendary axeman, Brian May! Still rocking stages and exploring the cosmos.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Moving Like Jagger
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger of The Rolling Stones.

events.title: MTV launched with iconic Buggles video
events.blurb: Forty-five years ago today, MTV launched with The Buggles' "Video Killed The Radio Star" as its very first music video.

angles.name: Radio Star Lives On
angles.copy: The ultimate irony? The first video ever played on MTV, 45 years ago today, was The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Radio is still very much alive, thank you very much!

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago today, cementing their place in Britpop history.

angles.name: Britpop Masterpiece
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival's 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, began 57 years ago today.

angles.name: Peace Love Music
angles.copy: Peace, love, and three days of music. Fifty-seven years ago today, the Woodstock Festival kicked off, defining a generation.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, would have been 91
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years on, the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, is still deeply missed. His music and legacy live on.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago today, featuring some of their most beloved tracks.

angles.name: Abbey Road Masterpiece
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles crossed that road one last time. 'Abbey Road' is still a masterpiece.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Cool
angles.copy: Seventy-five years of cool, Chrissie Hynde is still rocking with The Pretenders. Happy birthday to a true icon.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and solo artist, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam's Swagger
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Still bringing the rock 'n' roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released (UK, 1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem for peace, 'Imagine', was released as a single in the UK 51 years ago today.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Imagine no possessions... it's 51 years since John Lennon's iconic 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK. A message that still resonates.

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the anniversary of the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Forever
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred, it's James Bond Day! Celebrating 007's enduring legacy and incredible theme tunes.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. Imagine all the music still to come.
